💌 - takes place in Anakt Garden, just a few months before Alien Stage is set to begin; years after Hyunwoo’s death, your childhood friend group has dwindled down to just you and Hyuna after Hyunwoo passed and Luka was… excluded, while you and Hyuna coped with the change.
